parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  company_name,
  website,
  email,
  phone,
  contact_name,
  contact_title,
  notes,
  raw_data,
  company_description,
  contact_page_url,
  enrichment_status
FROM public.leads
WHERE id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const hasWebsite = Boolean(item.json.website);
const reason = hasWebsite ? 'invalid_website' : 'no_website';
const errors = [reason];
return {
  json: {
    ...item.json,
    homepage_url: item.json.website || null,
    homepage_accessible: false,
    homepage_block_reason: reason,
    homepage_http_status: null,
    contact_page_url_candidate: null,
    contact_page_accessible: null,
    contact_page_block_reason: null,
    contact_page_http_status: null,
    homepage_signals: null,
    contact_signals: null,
    extracted_emails: [],
    extracted_phones: [],
    errors,
    raw_data_enrichment_v01: {
      version: 'v0.1',
      processed_at: now,
      homepage_url: item.json.website || null,
      contact_page_url: null,
      homepage_accessible: false,
      homepage_block_reason: reason,
      homepage_http_status: null,
      contact_page_accessible: null,
      contact_page_block_reason: null,
      contact_page_http_status: null,
      extracted_emails: [],
      extracted_phones: [],
      errors,
    },
  },
};

nodes.name: Prepare Safe Lead Update
nodes.notes: Final sanitation before parameterized SQL: only safe raw_data fields and allowed enrichment_error codes are passed to PostgreSQL.

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.leads
SET
  company_description = COALESCE(NULLIF(company_description, ''), NULLIF($2, '')),
  contact_page_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(contact_page_url, ''), NULLIF($3, '')),
  email = COALESCE(NULLIF(email, ''), NULLIF($4, '')),
  phone = COALESCE(NULLIF(phone, ''), NULLIF($5, '')),
  contact_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(contact_name, ''), NULLIF($6, '')),
  contact_title = COALESCE(NULLIF(contact_title, ''), NULLIF($7, '')),
  raw_data = jsonb_set(COALESCE(raw_data, '{}'::jsonb), '{enrichment_v01}', $8::jsonb, true),
  enrichment_status = $9,
  enriched_at = NOW(),
  enrichment_error = NULLIF($10, '')
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING
  id,
  company_name,
  website,
  email,
  phone,
  contact_name,
  contact_title,
  score,
  grade,
  priority,
  enrichment_status,
  enriched_at,
  enrichment_error;

parameters.query:
SELECT

  company_name,
  website,
  email,
  phone,
  contact_name,
  contact_title,

FROM public.leads

LIMIT 1;
